_meta.framing: EXPLORATORY / hypothesis-generating — NOT an identified causal claim. Flat-bid logging + won-only (lost inventory censored) make bid→surplus non-identified; refutation tests are robustness diagnostics only.

estimate.identified_estimand:
Estimand type: EstimandType.NONPARAMETRIC_ATE

### Estimand : 1
Estimand name: backdoor
Estimand expression:
  d                                     
──────(E[surplus|campaign,user,context])
d[bid]                                  
Estimand assumption 1, Unconfoundedness: If U→{bid} and U→surplus then P(surplus|bid,campaign,user,context,U) = P(surplus|bid,campaign,user,context)

Estimand type: EstimandType.NONPARAMETRIC_ATE

### Estimand : 1
Estimand name: backdoor
Estimand expression:
  d                   
──────(E[win|context])
d[bid]                
Estimand assumption 1, Unconfoundedness: If U→{bid} and U→win then P(win|bid,context,U) = P(win|bid,context)

### Estimand : 2
Estimand name: iv
Estimand expression:
 ⎡                                                 -1⎤
 ⎢        d              ⎛        d               ⎞  ⎥
E⎢─────────────────(win)⋅⎜─────────────────([bid])⎟  ⎥
 ⎣d[campaign  user]      ⎝d[campaign  user]       ⎠  ⎦
Estimand assumption 1, As-if-random: If U→→win then ¬(U →→{campaign,user})
Estimand assumption 2, Exclusion: If we remove {campaign,user}→{bid}, then ¬({campaign,user}→win)
